skill: Ratios, rates, proportional relationships, and units
stem: The area of a triangular garden is increasing at a rate of 180 square feet per hour. Which of the following is closest to this rate in square meters per minute? (Use 1 meter = 3.28 feet.)
rationale: Since 1 m = 3.28 ft, 1 m² = (3.28)² ft² = 10.7584 ft². Converting 180 ft²/hr: (180 ft²/hr)(1 m²/10.7584 ft²)(1 hr/60 min) = 180/(10.7584 × 60) ≈ 0.279 m²/min. The closest choice is 0.28.
